Self-Sovereign Collaboration
Mission-Critical ChatOps
Real-Time DevSecOps Collaboration
Purpose-Built Collaboration Hub
Contact Sales
Operational Sovereignty for National Security and Critical Infrastructure
Collaboration, automation and AI for air-gapped, on-prem and private cloud environments. Trusted by governments, enterprises and allied militaries. Deploy anywhere. Control everything.
Talk to an Expert
Deployed by the world’s leading organizations
Control in a Connected World
Too many enterprises struggle with fragmented communications, uncontrolled data exposure, and manual workflows that can’t keep pace. Mattermost delivers sovereign collaboration, adaptive security, and AI-accelerated workflows — purpose-built automation and controls to outpace complexity and win in any environment.
Talk to a specialist in your region:
Speak with a Global Enterprise & Commercial specialist
Speak with a U.S. Defense & National Security specialist
Speak with a Five Eyes specialist
Parlez à un spécialiste NATO & Défense européenne
Sprechen Sie mit einem Bundeswehr- & NATO-Spezialisten
日本の防衛・セキュリティ専門家に相談
Speak with a Canadian Government & Defence specialist
(Other) Speak with an Allied Government specialist
Built for real-world mission success
Adaptable
Integrate and extend your collaboration environment to fit the tools you need to achieve the mission, from custom apps to industry standards.
Focused
With deep integrations with mission-critical tools, integrated playbooks and native audio calling, Mattermost cuts through the noise to keep your team focused on the workflows that matter most.
Secure
When you secure your data, you secure your mission. Robust security and compliance features ensure your data stays controlled and secure at all times.
Resilient
When incidents happen, effective recovery is critical to mission success. Support for self-hosted, private cloud and high-availability deployments give you control even in highly sensitive environments.
Proven in Mission-Critical Environments
Mattermost is used by mission-critical, intelligence, and critical infrastructure enterprises worldwide—including deployments within enterprises and allied government environments.

Purpose-built for critical infrastructure use cases:
Self Sovereign Collaboration
Meet evolving data control and user needs for real-time workflows
Challenge
: Organizations need to adapt to evolving international data control laws, user needs, vendor roadmaps and EOL schedules.
Mattermost Benefit:
Faster, better decisions and results
Maintain GDPR compliance under Schrems II
Ensure long-term commitment to self-hosting
Accelerate cross-organizational collaboration
Learn More »
Integrated Security Operations
Increase resilience with faster detection, response, and remediation workflows
Challenge:
Security organizations are understaffed and overhwelmed by alerts, tasks, and a continually expanding threat landscape.
Mattermost Benefit:
Streamline and simplify incident collaboration
Accelerate efficiency
Faster detection, response and remediation
Learn More »
Command + Control
Accelerate decision advantage, resilience and real-time outcomes
Challenge:
Expanding adversarial risk in cyber and kinetic warefare require faster, more efficient, better informed ways of coordinating operations.
Mattermost Benefit:
Accelerate decision advantage
Integrate internal presonnel, contractors and mission partners
Replace personal messaging app usage
Increase cross-group collaboration
Learn More »
Out of Band Incident Response
Prevent small incidents from becoming major issues
Challenge:
Collaboration systems rely on the availability of general purpose infrastructure which may be compromised during major breach events.
Mattermost Benefit:
Separate communication for defenders and compromised assets
Enable compliant and secure crisis communication
Faster Mean-Time to Detect, Respond and Remediate
Learn More »
Real-Time DevSecOps Collaboration
Speed software cycles with integrated ChatOps in strict security environments
Challenge:
Security and compliance requirements in critical infrastructure environments hamper the speed and efficiency of DevSecOps workflows.
Mattermost Benefit:
Ship software faster
Streamline security and compliance
Improve uptime and service levels
Meet custom platform requirements
Accelerate integration and operations in hybrid environments
Learn More »
Purpose Built Collaboration
Accelerate mission-critical workflows across people, tools, processes and AI platforms
Challenge:
The pace of digital transformation is growing exponentially as are the demands for speed, resilience, security, and keeping pace with AI innovation.
Mattermost Benefit:
Elevate efficiency and resilience
Integrate operations across legacy systems, modern SaaS and advanced AI
Accelerate decision advantage
Learn More »
The Intelligent Mission Environment
Zero Trust collaboration, workflow automation, and sovereign AI — in one platform. Built for the operational tempo of national security, cybersecurity, and critical infrastructure teams.
Microsoft Teams Interoperability
Embed Mattermost inside Teams, Outlook, and M365 to deliver sovereign operations integrated with global infrastructure.
See It All in Action
Watch a full walkthrough of assured collaboration — secure messaging, automated playbooks, AI agents, and sovereign deployment working together in a live mission environment.
Secure Messaging & Channels
Persistent, encrypted team communication with classification banners, data spillage prevention, and full audit trails.
Workflow & Playbook Automation
Codify operational procedures into repeatable, automated workflows that execute consistently under pressure.
Audio & Screenshare
Sovereign real-time calls with transcription and AI-powered summarization — no external dependencies.
Project & Task Management
Kanban boards and cross-functional coordination for mission planning, sprint execution, and compliance tracking.
Human-Machine Teaming
Sovereign AI agents that enrich, triage, and brief — integrated directly into operational channels.
Integration & AI Platform
Open API, webhooks, plugin architecture, and sovereign LLM connectivity — extend Mattermost into your existing toolchain and AI infrastructure without exposing data outside your perimeter.
Sovereign, Integrated Language Translation
Break language barriers across coalition and multinational operations without exposing sensitive communications to third-party translation services.
Advanced Information Controls
Attribute-Based Access Controls, classification banners, burn-on-read, data spillage mitigation, to enforce need-to-know at every level.
Microsoft Teams Interoperability
Embed Mattermost inside Teams, Outlook, and M365 to deliver sovereign operations integrated with global infrastructure.
See It All in Action
Watch a full walkthrough of assured collaboration — secure messaging, automated playbooks, AI agents, and sovereign deployment working together in a live mission environment.
Secure Messaging & Channels
Persistent, encrypted team communication with classification banners, data spillage prevention, and full audit trails.
Workflow & Playbook Automation
Codify operational procedures into repeatable, automated workflows that execute consistently under pressure.
Deploy anywhere. Control everything.
Operate within your jurisdiction, your infrastructure, and your security model.
Sovereign cloud (Azure, Oracle, Google, AWS)
On-prem / private cloud
Air-gapped / classified environments
Hybrid / multi-region deployments
Designed for teams with stringent security & privacy requirements
Designed for teams with stringent security & privacy requirements
Data Control & Governance

Granular admin controls
Full control over your data
Compliance & Scalability
Advanced compliance auditing & reporting
Designed for enterprise scalability
Deployment Flexibility
Flexible on-prem and secure cloud deployment
Cloud-neutral and self-host deployment options
Deployable in air-gapped networks and BYOD environments
Take command of your operations

Bluesky icon
Mattermost and third parties use cookies and similar technologies to collect data about your website use to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and enable personalized ads and content. By clicking “Allow All Cookies”, you consent to the use of cookies. Choose “Reject Optional Cookies” to reject cookies that are not essential for our services or click "Cookies Settings” to make more granular choices. To opt out of sales and sharing under U.S. state laws, choose “Reject Optional Cookies”. For more information about our practices, visit our Privacy Policy .
Cookies Settings
Reject Optional Cookies
Allow All Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
Privacy Preference Center
Your Privacy
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Performance Cookies
Functional Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Try Mattermost
Experience a 1-hour preview environment for:
Integrated Security Operations
Out-of-Band Incident Response
Self-Sovereign Collaboration
Mission-Critical ChatOps
Real-Time DevSecOps Collaboration
Purpose-Built Collaboration Hub
Contact Sales
Mattermost Pricing
Plans to accelerate mission-critical work in teams and enterprises
Get started for free with a limited-use edition of Enterprise Advanced for technical evaluation.
Try Mattermost Entry
Professional
Channel-centric for team collaboration
Contact Sales
Channel-Based Collaboration
Messaging, File Sharing, and Link and File Previews across Device Platforms
Channels-based messaging including 1-1, group messaging, public and private channels, file sharing, link and media previews across web, PC, Mac, iOS, and Android devices.
1:1 Audio Calls and Screen Sharing
Call another user to start a 1-1 audio discussion in web, desktop, and mobile experiences with optional screen sharing.
Threaded Discussions
Organize discussions within channels using threaded discussions and the thread inbox to follow-up on
threaded discussions
in addition to channels.
Core Search up to 3 Million Posts
Search over messages and files in Mattermost. Core search happens in a relational database and is intended for deployments under 3 million posts and file entries. Beyond that scale,
Enterprise Search
is recommended.
Custom Branding, Themes, and Emojis
Match your organizations look, feel and brand by
customizing
the site name, description, login brand image and text, as well as
theme colors
.
Hashtags
Hashtags in channel-based messaging enhance discoverability and organization by allowing users to tag key topics, themes, or initiatives directly within conversations. This makes it easier to filter, search, and follow relevant discussions across teams, improving collaboration and knowledge sharing.
Channel Categorization
Channel categorization helps teams stay organized by grouping related channels into custom sections, making it easier to navigate and prioritize conversations. This improves focus and efficiency, especially in high-volume workspaces where users need to quickly access the most relevant discussions.
Available in 20 Languages
Multiple languages including English (Australian, US), Bulgarian, Chinese (Simplified and Traditional), Dutch, French, German, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Persian, Polish, Portuguese (Brazil), Romanian, Russian, Spanish, Swedish, Turkish, Ukrainian, and Vietnamese.
Multi-Window Desktop
Enables users to open multiple chat windows simultaneously, enhancing multitasking and productivity. This capability ensures that priority conversations remain visible at all times, enabling users to monitor live updates and engage in multiple discussions without losing track
Compact View
Increase the efficiency of technical teams with
compact display views
of discussions and tooling notifications integrated in Mattermost channels.
Markdown Compatibility
Easily move information across Mattermost discussions and technical tooling outputs with built-in support for the Markdown technical formatting standard. Text formatting, code snippets, media embedding, tables, status indicators, and emojis render consistently across the Mattermost user experience and Markdown-compatible tools.
Message Priority
Elevate the focus of organizations with the ability for end users to specify the
priority of messages
as Standard (Default), Important, and Urgent.
Persistent Notifications
Mattermost’s Persistent Notifications feature ensures that urgent messages remain visible until acknowledged or replied to, enhancing the visibility of critical communications. Users can configure the frequency and maximum number of repeated notifications, ensuring that important alerts are not missed
Multi-Team Collaboration
Group Calling and Screen Share
Streamline real-time collaboration with complete privacy by enabling
group audio calling and screen share
up to approximately 50 concurrent users in any group call per self-hosted server. High-scale options for private, self-hosted group calling and screen share are available in Mattermost Enterprise with the setup of its horizontal scaling option.
Guest Accounts
Bring external users and users who need to have restricted access into your Mattermost instance.
Guests
in exactly one channel are treated as single-channel guests and are free up to a 1:1 ratio with licensed seats. Guests in multiple channels count as paid active users.
Custom User Groups
Simplify communication by creating
custom user groups
to mention and notify up to 256 users who work together on projects or in functions or have other ties. Examples include creating custom groups for cross-functional teams, for job types, or organization membership within an enterprise.
System-Wide Notifications
Notify users across teams of upcoming system maintenance, service changes, and other announcements using
system-wide announcement banners
.
Access Controls & Automation
Multifactor Authentication
Mattermost supports multifactor authentication (MFA), adding an extra layer of security beyond traditional username and password. This feature ensures that unauthorized users are denied access even if passwords are compromised, reducing the risk of account breaches
Single Sign-On
Mattermost’s Single Sign-On (SSO) feature allows users to log into multiple applications with a single set of credentials, streamlining the login process and enhancing security. This integration supports various SSO protocols, including SAML, OpenID Connect, and OAuth 2.0, ensuring seamless and secure access across platforms
AD/LDAP User Sync
AD/LDAP User Sync feature ensures seamless synchronization of user attributes and group memberships from Active Directory or LDAP directories. This integration automates user management, maintaining up-to-date user information and access controls across the platform
Advanced Access Controls
Empower admins to
manage and moderate multi-team deployments
with the ability to configure channels to be read-only, to restrict channel mentions and emoji reactions, and to lock down channels so that users can only be added or removed by selected administrators.
Agentic Platform
Interactive AI Bot Support
Interactive AI Bot Support in Mattermost enhances collaboration by integrating AI-driven bots that assist with workflows, provide real-time updates, and automate routine tasks. These bots can interact with users and each other, leveraging multiple models and configurations to streamline operations and improve efficiency
Bring-Your-Own & Multi-LLM Integration
Mattermost’s Flexible Bring-Your-Own-LLM Integration allows organizations to integrate their privately hosted language models into the Mattermost platform. This feature supports multiple AI/LLM service backends and ensures unified management, observability, and reliability of both private and commercial LLMs, providing a consistent interface and enhanced security for mission-critical operations
Integrations Platform
Integrations Platform
Mattermost’s Integrations Platform offers operational extensibility with pre-packaged, source-available connectors, automations, and templates for rapid and effective systems integration. This platform supports seamless integration with modern toolchains and legacy systems, enhancing workflow automation and collaboration
Operational and DevOps Integrations
Mattermost’s Integrations Platform enhances operational and DevOps workflows by seamlessly integrating with modern toolchains and legacy systems. This platform supports rapid and effective systems integration with pre-packaged, source-available connectors, automations, and templates, ensuring streamlined collaboration and increased productivity. Mattermost pre-packages integrations with most common developer tools, including Jira, GitHub, GitLab, Zoom, and more.
Support
Community Support
Community support for all Mattermost offerings is available on
peer-to-peer forums
. Organizations using Mattermost Free to evaluate a future purchase of Mattermost Enterprise can
contact sales
to apply for early access to commercial support as part of the evaluation process.
Professional Support
Professional Support includes business hours support from 8am to 8pm United States Pacific Time (UTC-8 except for U.S. daylight savings time), with next business day response time via email and the Mattermost
online ticketing system
. For more information,
please see this
.
Maximum 250 Users
Enterprise
For Secure Collaborative Workflows
Get Pricing
Everything in Professional, Plus:
Agentic Platform
Sovereign AI
Mattermost supports Sovereign AI, enabling secure, mission-critical operations with full data sovereignty. This feature allows deployment in air-gapped, private, or sovereign cloud environments, ensuring that sensitive data remains under complete control while leveraging AI to streamline workflows, communication, and incident response
Contextual Summarization and Composition
Contextual Summarization and Composition in Mattermost leverages AI to provide concise summaries and generate relevant content based on the context of discussions. This feature enhances productivity by allowing users to quickly grasp key points and compose responses without reviewing the raw input, ensuring efficient and informed communication
Real-Time Channel Briefing
Mattermost’s Real-Time Channel Briefing feature brings teams together for coordinated remediation and situational awareness. By integrating live transcription, call recordings, and automated summaries, this feature ensures clarity and alignment during high-stakes situations. Critical information, such as chat logs, call transcripts, and audio recordings, are preserved in the Call thread, providing searchable documentation for post-incident analysis and compliance
Universal Connector with Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Mattermost’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) support empowers AI to securely search across enterprise systems and take action in real time—without leaving the Mattermost environment. Through the Universal Connector, AI models can access external tools, retrieve knowledge, and trigger workflows using a standardized, scalable framework. This enables faster, smarter decision-making by turning conversations into context-aware, cross-system actions—securely and at scale.
Agents Enhanced Search
Mattermost’s Agent-enhanced Search uses semantic understanding to deliver context-aware answers across your workspace while respecting access controls. It not only finds the right information — even when phrased differently — but summarizes it with references to the original source, so users can trust and verify results.
Enterprise LLM Management
Enterprise LLM Management in Mattermost empowers organizations to efficiently manage and deploy large language models, enabling granular billing and usage tracking. Assign LLM account authorizations at the user, group, or team level, and track LLM token usage at the user level for optimal performance and accountability.
Sovereign Agentic Web Search
Add the full power of real-time web search into your secure Mattermost environment with your sovereign LLM.
Channel-Context Summarization
Instant, AI-generated summaries of unreads and custom date ranges (up to 14 days) directly in the channel header. The LLM provides precise, sourced answers, formatted action items, key highlights, and direct source links to keep projects moving.
Agents Token Accounting
Admins can track detailed usage metrics — including unique users and token counts — by integrating with existing Grafana logging structures.
Multiplayer Tool Calling
Users can invoke agents within channels or group messages delegating their own permissions to it.
Tool Policy Editor
Admins have granular control over tool execution, allowing them to configure which tools require approval based on the context (e.g., DM versus channel) or to disable specific tools entirely.
Agent Creation
End users can create, update, delete, and share agents using a configuration UI, provided they have the appropriate permissions. Within this UI, creators can set custom instructions, enable specific MCP tools, configure channel and user access, and assign other users as agent admins to share tools and practices across their team.
Real-Time Communications
Calls with Live-Text Transcription & AI Summaries
Enhance mission-critical communication with Calls featuring Live-Text Transcription and AI Summaries in Mattermost. This capability captures every spoken word in real time and automatically generates concise, AI-powered summaries—ensuring your teams stay aligned, informed, and ready to act, even in fast-paced or high-pressure environments.
Video Integrations
Elevate secure collaboration with Mattermost Video Integrations, including Pexip, Zoom, and Microsoft Teams. Whether self-hosted for maximum control or integrated with your existing video platforms, Mattermost enables seamless video calls, screen sharing, and chat—right within

Mattermost Product Documentation
¶
Mattermost’s purpose is to accelerate the world’s mission critical work by developing and delivering secure, open core collaboration software providing unrivaled focus, adaptability and resilience to our customers. On this site you’ll find an overview of our products, features, security, integrations, licensing and subscriptions, authentication, and compliance support. Learn more about the
Mattermost Intelligent Mission Environment (IME)
.
Capabilities
¶
Mattermost offers a wide range of capabilities:
Mess

Cookie Policy

Manage Cookies
GitHub icon
LinkedIn icon
Facebook icon
X icon
Bluesky icon
Mattermost and third parties use cookies and similar technologies to collect data about your website use to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and enable personalized ads and content. By clicking “Allow All Cookies”, you consent to the use of cookies. Choose “Reject Optional Cookies” to reject cookies that are not essential for our services or click "Cookies Settings” to make more granular choices. To opt out of sales and sharing under U.S. state laws, choose “Reject Optional Cookies”. For more information about our practices, visit our Privacy Policy .
Cookies Settings
Reject Optional Cookies
Allow All Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
Privacy Preference Center
Your Privacy
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Performance Cookies
Functional Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Mattermost restricted access to old messages after 10000 limit is reached
Open-Source Slack Alternative Mattermost Gets $50M Funding
Mattermost – open-source platform for secure collaboration
GitLab Mattermost, an open source on-premises Slack alternative

analysis.name: Mattermost
analysis.tagline: Operational Sovereignty for National Security and Critical Infrastructure
analysis.value_proposition: Sovereign, self-hostable collaboration, automation, and AI for air-gapped, on-prem, and private cloud environments used by governments, enterprises, and militaries.
analysis.ideal_customer: Defense, national security, critical infrastructure, and regulated enterprise teams needing self-hosted, sovereign, high-security collaboration and ChatOps.

features.name: channels
features.description: Channel-based messaging with 1-1, group, public and private channels
features.evidence_quote: Channels-based messaging including 1-1, group messaging, public and private channels

features.name: file sharing
features.description: File sharing with link and media previews across devices
features.evidence_quote: file sharing, link and media previews across web, PC, Mac, iOS, and Android devices

features.name: 1:1 audio calls
features.description: 1-1 audio discussion in web, desktop, and mobile
features.evidence_quote: Call another user to start a 1-1 audio discussion in web, desktop, and mobile

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Optional screen sharing during calls
features.evidence_quote: 1:1 Audio Calls and Screen Sharing

features.name: group calling
features.description: Group audio calling up to ~50 concurrent users per self-hosted server
features.evidence_quote: group audio calling and screen share up to approximately 50 concurrent users

differentiators: Sovereign, self-hosted and air-gapped deployment for defense and national security
Purpose-built for mission-critical ChatOps and out-of-band incident response
Open-source / source-available with full data control
Deep interoperability with MS Teams, Atlassian, and GitLab for regulated enterprises

recent_ships.what: Mattermost Enterprise Advanced launched for multi-domain secure operations
recent_ships.source: Introducing Mattermost Enterprise Advanced: The Future of Multi-Domain Secure Operations

praised: "most stable, flexible, and competitively priced platform available" (Enelyst)
"managing Mattermost ourselves makes it easier to investigate when a problem occurs" (Fujitsu)
complaints: Enterprise-only pricing (no public tier prices) — contact-sales friction
Group calls capped at ~50 concurrent users per self-hosted server without horizontal scaling
Some plugins (e.g. Zendesk) not compatible with newer server versions >10.0
Core search limited to 3M posts before Elasticsearch is required

free_tier.limits: Mattermost Entry — limited-use edition of Enterprise Advanced for technical evaluation

tiers.name: Entry (Free)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Limited-use Enterprise Advanced for technical evaluation

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced security, scale, enterprise search, HA

tiers.name: Enterprise Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-domain secure operations for defense/national security

pricing.notes: All paid tiers are contact-sales — no public per-seat pricing. Free tier is a limited-use eval of Enterprise Advanced. Single-channel guests are free up to 1:1 ratio with licensed seats; multi-channel guests count as paid seats. Group calling capped ~50 users per server without horizontal scaling add-on.

recent_hn.title: The Oats Protocol – Open Agent Tools for Local Coding Agents
